Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 1st, 2010 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: April 1st, 2010 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: July 27th, 2010 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for fantasy action violence, some frightening images and brief sensuality
(Rating bulletin 2112, 3/17/2010)
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: Clash of the Titans
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake, Visual Effects

Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
